reviews.comment:
Horrible, te matan con los precios y te atienden lento y sin ganas.

(Translated by Google)
Horrible, they kill you with their prices and serve you slowly and without enthusiasm.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5em9Tcl9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente parque parrilla y restaurant

(Translated by Google)
Excellent park, grill and restaurant
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5OW9DV1BREAE

reviews.comment:
Ideal para comer rapido y descansar un rato del viaje por la ruta 2.

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for a quick meal and a short break from your trip on Route 2.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MW9MTm9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cada vez que vamos a Mar del Plata cargamos ahi como una parada obligatoria hacemos un buen descanso y nos atienden bien gracias

(Translated by Google)
Every time we go to Mar del Plata, we fill up there as a mandatory stop; we get a good rest and they treat us well, thank you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NXZPbU13EAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre fue un lugar excelente para hacer una parada técnica y tomar un rico cafecito

(Translated by Google)
It was always an excellent place to make a pit stop and have a delicious coffee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NXJPd3l3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención y me encanta parar ahi para tomar algo fresco bajo los arboles

(Translated by Google)
Great service and I love stopping there for a refreshing drink under the trees
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cHBPSWt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente parada para el descanso del viaje y varias opciones para comer algo con precios razonables

(Translated by Google)
Excellent stop for a rest during the journey and several options for eating something at reasonable prices
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5eG9HeDN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelentes instalaciones! Los baños muy limpios. Muy buena atención!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent facilities! Very clean bathrooms. Very good service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5aHZiOUdREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicio, recomendable para carga de combustible descansar y tomar un rico café, o comer deliciosas hamburguesas.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station, recommended for refueling, resting and having a delicious coffee, or eating delicious hamburgers.

(Translated by Google)
Very good!!! All services available

reviews.comment:
Son amables ,el lugar limpio y también hay un descanso muy lindo para parar y almorzar o tomar mate.

(Translated by Google)
They are friendly, the place is clean, and there is also a very nice break to stop and have lunch or drink mate.
